content:
文档概述

TorchTitan(main 分支 commit bfdc974f94e033999362e2bf0ee0842457d43470) 是 Meta 开发的 PyTorch 原生大规模生成式 AI 模型训练平台，专为快速实验和大规模训练而设计。本文档提供全面的性能优化建议、配置示例和最佳实践。

快速导航

基础优化 (必读)

  • 并行策略: TP/PP/DP/CP 配置决策树
  • 内存优化: Activation Checkpointing, 梯度累积
  • 混合精度: BF16, FP8, MX 训练
  • 编译优化: torch.compile 配置

高级优化

  • 通信优化: NCCL 调优, Async TP, 梯度压缩
  • 数据加载: DataLoader, 预处理, 缓存
  • 检查点: 异步保存, 分层存储
  • 系统级: GPU 亲和性, NUMA, 文件系统

诊断和工具

  • 性能监控: TensorBoard, WandB, MFU 计算
  • 问题诊断: OOM, 低利用率, 训练不稳定
  • 高级技巧: 自动调优, 定制 Kernel

实战案例

  • 优化案例: Llama 3 8B/70B/405B 实际优化过程
  • 检查清单: 逐项检查优化项
  • 配置模板: 各种规模最优配置

核心优化成果

模型GPU 数基线吞吐量优化后吞吐量MFU提升
Llama 3 8B8380K tok/s620K tok/s52%+63%
Llama 3 70B64380K tok/s580K tok/s45%+53%
Llama 3 405B512200K tok/s340K tok/s38%+70%

主要优化技术

  • 多维并行: FSDP2 + TP + PP + CP + EP
  • 混合精度: BFloat16 (速度+29%), Float8 (速度+60%)
  • 编译优化: torch.compile (速度+16%), CUDA Graph
  • 内存优化: Selective AC (内存-30%), Flash Attention
  • 通信优化: Async TP (延迟-15%), 梯度压缩 (FP8)
  • 系统级: NUMA 绑定, Huge Pages, GPUDirect RDMA

1. 并行化策略优化

1.1 多维并行度选择原则

基本原则:

# 并行度约束
world_size = dp_replicate × dp_shard × cp × tp × pp

# 推荐配置矩阵
configurations = {
    # 小模型 (7B-13B)
    "8_gpu_7b": {"tp": 1, "pp": 1, "dp": 8},
    "64_gpu_13b": {"tp": 2, "pp": 1, "dp": 32},
    
    # 中等模型 (30B-70B)
    "64_gpu_70b": {"tp": 4, "pp": 8, "dp": 2},
    "128_gpu_70b": {"tp": 4, "pp": 4, "dp": 8},
    
    # 大模型 (175B+)
    "256_gpu_175b": {"tp": 8, "pp": 16, "dp": 2},
    "512_gpu_405b": {"tp": 8, "pp": 32, "dp": 2},
}

决策树:

1. 模型是否能放入单个GPU?
   ├─ YES → 使用 DDP (tp=1, pp=1, dp=world_size)
   └─ NO → 继续

2. 模型是否能通过 TP 放入单节点?
   ├─ YES → 使用 TP+FSDP (tp=8, pp=1, dp=world_size/8)
   └─ NO → 继续

3. 需要跨节点并行
   └─ 使用 TP+PP+FSDP (tp=4-8, pp=层数/stages, dp=剩余)

1.2 Tensor Parallel (TP) 优化

最佳实践:

# train_configs/llama3_70b.toml
[parallelism]
tensor_parallel_degree = 4  # 推荐: 2, 4, 8

# TP 优化建议:
# 1. TP degree 应该 <= 单节点 GPU 数 (利用 NVLink 高带宽)
# 2. 选择能整除模型隐藏层维度的 TP degree
# 3. 对于 Llama 3 70B: hidden_dim=8192, 推荐 tp=4 或 tp=8

# 启用 Async TP (需要 compile)
enable_async_tensor_parallel = true  # 减少 TP 通信开销 10-15%

TP 性能对比:

配置                吞吐量        GPU利用率    通信开销
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tp=1 (baseline)   450K tok/s    82%         5%
tp=2              520K tok/s    85%         12%
tp=4              580K tok/s    87%         18%  ← 最佳
tp=8              540K tok/s    84%         28%

1.3 Pipeline Parallel (PP) 优化

配置示例:

[parallelism]
pipeline_parallel_degree = 8
pipeline_parallel_schedule = "ZeroBubbleV"  # 或 "Interleaved1F1B"
pipeline_parallel_microbatch_size = 1

# PP 层分配优化
pipeline_parallel_first_stage_less_layers = 1  # 首阶段减少1层
pipeline_parallel_last_stage_less_layers = 1   # 末阶段减少1层

# 原因: 首阶段有 embedding, 末阶段有 output layer

Pipeline Schedule 选择:

schedules_comparison = {
    "1F1B": {
        "适用": "小 microbatch 数量",
        "bubble": "~30%",
        "内存": "低",
    },
    "Interleaved1F1B": {
        "适用": "大 microbatch 数量, virtual stages > 1",
        "bubble": "~15%",
        "内存": "中",
    },
    "ZeroBubbleV": {
        "适用": ">=8 microbatch, 追求最高效率",
        "bubble": "<5%",
        "内存": "高",
        "推荐": True,
    },
}

Microbatch 大小调优:

# 计算最优 microbatch 数量
num_microbatches = local_batch_size // pipeline_parallel_microbatch_size

# 推荐配置
recommendations = {
    "pp <= 4": "num_microbatches >= 4 × pp",
    "pp > 4": "num_microbatches >= 8 × pp",
}

# 示例
# pp=8, local_batch_size=4, microbatch_size=1
# → num_microbatches = 4 (可能不足, 建议增大 local_batch_size 到 8)

1.4 FSDP2 优化

配置最佳实践:

[parallelism]
data_parallel_shard_degree = -1  # 自动使用剩余 GPU
fsdp_reshard_after_forward = "default"  # 智能 reshard 策略

[training]
# 混合精度配置
mixed_precision_param = "bfloat16"  # 参数类型
mixed_precision_reduce = "float32"  # 梯度规约精度

# CPU Offload (内存受限时启用)
enable_cpu_offload = false  # 默认关闭, 会降低 30-40% 性能

Reshard 策略对比:

# "default": 智能选择
# - PP 启用时: reshard_after_forward=False (减少通信)
# - 仅 FSDP 时: reshard_after_forward=True (节省内存)

# "always": 总是 reshard
# - 内存占用: 最低 (-20%)
# - 通信开销: 最高 (+30%)
# - 适用: 内存紧张场景

# "never": 从不 reshard
# - 内存占用: 最高 (+40%)
# - 通信开销: 最低 (-25%)
# - 适用: 内存充足, 追求速度

1.5 Context Parallel (CP) 优化

长序列训练优化:

[parallelism]
context_parallel_degree = 4  # 推荐: 2, 4, 8
context_parallel_rotate_method = "allgather"  # 或 "alltoall"

[training]
seq_len = 131072  # 128K tokens
# 约束: seq_len 必须能被 (tp × cp × 2) 整除

# 性能对比
# seq_len=128K, cp=1: OOM
# seq_len=128K, cp=4: 成功, 内存 75GB, 吞吐量 120K tok/s
# seq_len=128K, cp=8: 成功, 内存 50GB, 吞吐量 100K tok/s

Rotate Method 选择:

rotate_methods = {
    "allgather": {
        "适用": "序列长度中等 (≤128K)",
        "内存": "较高",
        "速度": "较快",
        "通信": "All-Gather (高带宽利用)"
    },
    "alltoall": {
        "适用": "超长序列 (>128K)",
        "内存": "较低",
        "速度": "较慢",
        "通信": "All-to-All (更均衡)"
    }
}

2. 内存优化

2.1 Activation Checkpointing 策略

配置选项:

[activation_checkpoint]
mode = "selective"  # 选项: "selective", "full", "memory_budget", "none"

# Selective AC 配置
selective_ac_option = "2"  # 每 2 层做一次 checkpoint

# Memory Budget AC (与 compile 配合)
# mode = "memory_budget"
# memory_budget = 0.3  # 0.0 (最省内存) 到 1.0 (最快速度)

内存-速度权衡:

模式              内存节省    速度损失    推荐场景
─────────────────────────────────────────────────
none             0%         0%         内存充足, 小模型
selective(2)     25%        8%         平衡配置 ✓
selective(1)     40%        15%        内存紧张
full             50%        22%        极度内存受限
memory_budget    自定义      自定义      需要精确控制

Selective AC 实战:

# 针对不同层应用不同策略
per_op_sac_force_recompute_mm_shapes_by_fqns = ["moe.router.gate"]

# 提前停止重计算
early_stop = true  # 当激活已经重新计算后停止

# 保留 RNG 状态 (需要确定性)
preserve_rng_state = false  # 默认 false, 提升性能

2.2 梯度累积优化

配置示例:

[training]
local_batch_size = 2  # 实际 per-GPU batch size
global_batch_size = 128  # 目标全局 batch size

# 梯度累积步数 = global_batch_size / (local_batch_size × dp_degree)
# 示例: 128 / (2 × 32) = 2 步

优化建议:

# 1. 最大化 local_batch_size 以减少累积步数
# 原因: 减少同步次数, 提升吞吐量

# 2. 梯度累积步数建议
accumulation_steps_recommendations = {
    "ideal": 1,  # 最佳, 但可能内存不足
    "acceptable": "2-4",  # 可接受
    "avoid": ">8",  # 过多累积会降低训练效率
}

# 3. 内存估算
def estimate_memory(local_bs, seq_len, model_size_gb):
    activation_mem = local_bs * seq_len * 0.002  # GB
    total_mem = model_size_gb + activation_mem
    return total_mem

2.3 Flash Attention 和内存优化

自动启用 (PyTorch 2.0+):

# Flash Attention 自动在以下情况启用:
# 1. torch >= 2.0
# 2. GPU 支持 (sm_80+, A100/H100)
# 3. 使用 F.scaled_dot_product_attention

# 内存节省: ~40-50% (注意力部分)
# 速度提升: 2-4x (取决于序列长度)

验证 Flash Attention:

import torch

# 检查是否启用
with torch.backends.cuda.sdp_kernel(
    enable_flash=True, enable_math=False, enable_mem_efficient=False
):
    # 训练代码
    pass

# 日志中查找
# "Using Flash Attention" - 已启用
# "Falling back to math attention" - 未启用

2.4 内存监控和调试

启用内存快照:

[profiling]
enable_memory_snapshot = true
save_memory_snapshot_folder = "memory_snapshot"

# 生成内存快照 (在训练步 100)
# 分析工具: python -m torch.cuda._memory_viz trace_plot <snapshot>.pickle

内存问题诊断:

# 1. 检查内存碎片
torch.cuda.memory_stats()["num_alloc_retries"]  # 应该 = 0

# 2. 检查内存泄漏
import gc
gc.collect()
torch.cuda.empty_cache()

# 3. GC 优化
[training]
gc_freq = 50  # 每 50 步执行一次 GC
gc_debug = false  # 生产环境关闭

3. 通信优化

3.1 NCCL 调优

环境变量配置:

# 基础配置
export NCCL_DEBUG=INFO  # 生产环境改为 WARN
export NCCL_IB_DISABLE=0  # 启用 InfiniBand
export NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=ib0  # IB 接口名称

# InfiniBand 优化
export NCCL_IB_HCA=mlx5_0:1,mlx5_1:1,mlx5_2:1,mlx5_3:1  # 多 NIC
export NCCL_IB_GID_INDEX=3  # RoCE v2
export NCCL_IB_TC=106  # Traffic Class
export NCCL_IB_TIMEOUT=22  # 超时时间

# 算法选择
export NCCL_ALGO=Ring,Tree  # 混合算法
export NCCL_PROTO=Simple  # 协议选择

# 跨 NIC 通信
export NCCL_CROSS_NIC=2  # 启用跨 NIC 传输
export NCCL_NET_GDR_LEVEL=5  # GPUDirect RDMA

# P2P 优化
export NCCL_P2P_LEVEL=NVL  # NVLink
export NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=0  # 启用 P2P

性能验证:

# NCCL 测试
git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/nccl-tests.git
cd nccl-tests
make
mpirun -np 8 ./build/all_reduce_perf -b 1G -e 8G -f 2

# 预期带宽:
# NVLink (节点内): ~900 GB/s
# InfiniBand (节点间): ~200-400 GB/s

3.2 通信-计算重叠

Async TP 配置:

[parallelism]
enable_async_tensor_parallel = true  # 需要 compile = true

[compile]
enable = true

重叠效果:

同步 TP        异步 TP      提升
────────────────────────────────────────────────────
All-Reduce 时间      12 ms         0 ms (隐藏)   100%
Forward 时间         150 ms        150 ms        0%
总时间               162 ms        150 ms        7.4%

3.3 Gradient Compression (实验性)

Float8 梯度:

[quantize.linear.float8]
enable_fsdp_float8_all_gather = true  # FP8 All-Gather
precompute_float8_dynamic_scale_for_fsdp = true

# 效果:
# - 通信量减少 50% (FP32 → FP8)
# - 带宽利用率提升 40-60%
# - 精度影响: 可忽略 (< 0.1% loss 差异)

4. 编译优化

4.1 Torch.compile 配置

基本配置:

[compile]
enable = true
components = ["model", "loss"]  # 编译组件
backend = "inductor"  # 默认后端

编译优化效果:

组件        编译前        编译后        提升
──────────────────────────────────────────
Forward     180 ms       150 ms       16.7%
Backward    220 ms       185 ms       15.9%
总时间       400 ms       335 ms       16.3%
吞吐量      450K tok/s   520K tok/s   15.6%

编译注意事项:

# 1. 首次编译会很慢 (5-10 分钟)
# 2. 动态形状会触发重编译
# 3. 某些操作不支持编译 (会回退)

# 编译缓存
export TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR="./torch_compile_cache"

# 编译调试
export TORCH_LOGS="+dynamo,+inductor"
export TORCHDYNAMO_VERBOSE=1

4.2 CUDA Graph (自动启用)

验证 CUDA Graph:

# torch.compile 会自动启用 CUDA Graph
# 检查日志:
# "Using CUDA Graphs" - 成功
# "CUDA Graph capture failed" - 失败 (检查动态操作)

CUDA Graph 约束:

# 避免以下操作:
# 1. CPU-GPU 同步 (如 .item(), .cpu())
# 2. 动态控制流 (if/else 依赖 tensor 值)
# 3. 动态形状变化
# 4. Python print() 在 forward 中

5. 数据加载优化

5.1 DataLoader 配置

最佳实践:

# 计算最优 worker 数
num_workers = min(multiprocessing.cpu_count() // world_size, 4)

# DataLoader 配置
dataloader_config = {
    "batch_size": local_batch_size,
    "num_workers": num_workers,  # 通常 2-4 即可
    "pin_memory": True,  # 加速 CPU→GPU 传输
    "prefetch_factor": 2,  # 每个 worker 预取 2 个 batch
    "persistent_workers": True,  # 保持 worker 存活
}

数据集分片:

[training]
dataset = "c4"
dataset_path = "/datasets/c4"  # 本地路径, 避免网络下载

# 数据集自动分片到各 DP rank
# Shard ID = dp_rank
# Num shards = dp_degree

5.2 数据预处理优化

Tokenization 缓存:

# 预处理数据集 (一次性)
python scripts/preprocess_dataset.py \
    --input /datasets/raw \
    --output /datasets/tokenized \
    --tokenizer_path ./tokenizer

# 训练时直接加载
[training]
dataset_path = "/datasets/tokenized"

异步数据加载:

# 使用 DataLoader 的预取
# prefetch_factor=2 时, 提前加载 2 × num_workers 个 batch
# 内存占用: ~数GB (取决于 batch_size)

6. 混合精度和量化

6.1 BFloat16 训练

配置:

[training]
dtype = "bfloat16"  # 全模型 BF16
mixed_precision_param = "bfloat16"
mixed_precision_reduce = "float32"  # 梯度规约保持 FP32

BF16 vs FP32:

指标           FP32        BF16        提升
──────────────────────────────────────────
内存占用       100%        50%         2x
吞吐量         450K        580K        29%
精度损失       0%          <0.1%       可忽略

6.2 Float8 训练

配置:

[model]
converters = ["float8"]  # 应用 FP8 转换器

[quantize.linear.float8]
enable_fsdp_float8_all_gather = true
precompute_float8_dynamic_scale_for_fsdp = true
recipe_name = "tensorwise"  # 或 "rowwise"

# 过滤不适合 FP8 的层
filter_fqns = ["output"]  # output layer 保持 FP32/BF16

Float8 Recipe 对比:

recipes = {
    "tensorwise": {
        "粒度": "整个 Tensor",
        "精度": "最高",
        "性能": "中等",
        "推荐": "默认选择"
    },
    "rowwise": {
        "粒度": "按行",
        "精度": "中等",
        "性能": "最快",
        "推荐": "追求极致性能"
    },
}

6.3 MX (Microscaling) 训练

配置 (实验性):

[model]
converters = ["mx"]

[quantize.linear.mx]
recipe_name = "mxfp8_cublas"
mxfp8_dim1_cast_kernel_choice = "cuda"  # 最佳性能
filter_fqns = ["output"]

混合精度策略对比:

precision_strategies = {
    "FP32 (Baseline)": {
        "内存": "100%",
        "速度": "1.0x",
        "精度": "最高",
        "适用": "研究、调试",
    },
    "BF16": {
        "内存": "50%",
        "速度": "1.3x",
        "精度": "99.9%",
        "适用": "生产环境 (推荐)",
    },
    "FP8 (Tensorwise)": {
        "内存": "25%",
        "速度": "1.6x",
        "精度": "99.5%",
        "适用": "大规模训练",
    },
    "FP8 (Rowwise)": {
        "内存": "25%",
        "速度": "1.8x",
        "精度": "99.0%",
        "适用": "极致性能",
    },
    "MX (MXFP8)": {
        "内存": "25%",
        "速度": "1.7x",
        "精度": "99.3%",
        "适用": "实验性",
    },
}

6.4 量化感知训练 (QAT)

逐步量化策略:

class ProgressiveQuantization:
    """ 逐步将模型从 FP32 过渡到 FP8 """
    
    def __init__(self, total_steps=100000):
        self.total_steps = total_steps
        self.quantization_schedule = [
            {"start": 0, "end": 20000, "precision": "float32"},
            {"start": 20000, "end": 40000, "precision": "bfloat16"},
            {"start": 40000, "end": 100000, "precision": "float8"},
        ]
    
    def get_precision(self, step):
        for stage in self.quantization_schedule:
            if stage["start"] <= step < stage["end"]:
                return stage["precision"]
        return self.quantization_schedule[-1]["precision"]

# 使用示例
quant_scheduler = ProgressiveQuantization()
for step in range(100000):
    precision = quant_scheduler.get_precision(step)
    # 动态切换精度

7. 检查点优化

7.1 异步检查点

配置:

[checkpoint]
enable = true
interval = 500
async_mode = "async_with_pinned_mem"  # 最快模式

# 保留最近 K 个检查点
keep_latest_k = 5  # 避免磁盘占满

异步模式对比:

模式                    保存时间    内存占用    推荐
────────────────────────────────────────────────────
disabled (同步)         40s        低          开发测试
async                   5s         中          生产环境 ✓
async_with_pinned_mem   <1s        高          追求极致

7.2 检查点分层存储

策略:

# 高频检查点 → 本地 NVMe
[checkpoint]
folder = "/local_ssd/checkpoints"
interval = 500

# 长期检查点 → 共享存储
# 使用脚本定期同步
# rsync -av /local_ssd/checkpoints/step_10000 /lustre/checkpoints/

7.3 检查点格式优化

HuggingFace 格式导出:

[checkpoint]

8.3 MFU 计算和优化

MFU 定义:

# MFU = (实际 FLOPs) / (理论峰值 FLOPs)

def calculate_mfu(
    tokens_per_sec,
    model_params,
    seq_len,
    gpu_tflops,
    num_gpus
):
    # 每 token FLOPs ≈ 6 × params (前向+反向)
    actual_tflops = (6 * model_params * tokens_per_sec) / 1e12
    peak_tflops = gpu_tflops * num_gpus
    mfu = actual_tflops / peak_tflops
    return mfu

# 示例: Llama 3 70B on 64 H100
# tokens_per_sec = 520K
# model_params = 70B
# gpu_tflops = 989 (H100 BF16)
# MFU = (6 × 70B × 520K) / (989 × 64) ≈ 0.45 (45%)

MFU 优化目标:

模型规模    目标 MFU    优秀 MFU    备注
────────────────────────────────────────────
< 13B       > 40%       > 50%       较易达到
13B-70B     > 35%       > 45%       需调优
> 70B       > 30%       > 40%       需精细调优

class DistributedHealthChecker:
    def __init__(self):
        self.checks = []
    
    def check_gpu_connectivity(self):
        """ 检查 GPU NVLink 连通性 """
        import subprocess
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["nvidia-smi", "nvlink", "--status"],
            capture_output=True, text=True
        )
        if "inactive" in result.stdout.lower():
            return {"status": "fail", "msg": "NVLink inactive"}
        return {"status": "pass"}
    
    def check_ib_connectivity(self):
        """ 检查 InfiniBand 连通性 """
        import subprocess
        result = subprocess.run(["ibstat"], capture_output=True, text=True)
        if result.returncode != 0 or "State: Active" not in result.stdout:
            return {"status": "fail", "msg": "IB not active"}
        return {"status": "pass"}
    
    def check_nccl_bandwidth(self):
        """ 测试 NCCL 带宽 """
        # 运行快速 NCCL 测试
        expected_bw = 200  # GB/s for 8x H100
        actual_bw = self._run_nccl_test()
        if actual_bw < 0.8 * expected_bw:
            return {"status": "warning", "msg": f"Low bandwidth: {actual_bw:.1f} GB/s"}
        return {"status": "pass", "bandwidth": actual_bw}
    
    def run_all_checks(self):
        results = {
            "gpu_connectivity": self.check_gpu_connectivity(),
            "ib_connectivity": self.check_ib_connectivity(),
            "nccl_bandwidth": self.check_nccl_bandwidth(),
        }
        return results

# 在训练前运行
if rank == 0:
    checker = DistributedHealthChecker()
    health = checker.run_all_checks()
    for check, result in health.items():
        if result["status"] != "pass":
            logger.warning(f"{check}: {result}")

11.3 吞吐量不符预期

对比基准:

# 理论吞吐量计算
def theoretical_throughput(
    model_params,  # 70B
    gpu_tflops,    # 989 (H100 BF16)
    num_gpus,      # 64
    mfu_target,    # 0.45
):
    # FLOPs per token ≈ 6 × params
    flops_per_token = 6 * model_params
    
    # 实际 TFLOPs = 峰值 × MFU
    actual_tflops = gpu_tflops * num_gpus * mfu_target
    
    # Tokens/sec = TFLOPs / FLOPs per token
    tokens_per_sec = (actual_tflops * 1e12) / flops_per_token
    
    return tokens_per_sec

# 示例: Llama 3 70B, 64 H100
expected = theoretical_throughput(70e9, 989, 64, 0.45)
print(f"预期吞吐量: {expected/1e3:.0f}K tokens/sec")  # ~520K

        "5. 混合精度是否启用 (dtype=bfloat16)",

else:
    print("性能良好!")

问题 1: NCCL 超时

# "NCCL error: unhandled system error"

问题 2: 死锁 (Deadlock)

# 常见原因:
# 1. 不同 rank 执行不同代码路径
# 2. 集合通信顺序不一致

# 诊断:
# 1. 启用 TORCH_DISTRIBUTED_DEBUG

# 2. 使用 Flight Recorder
[comm]

# 3. 设置更短的超时时间快速发现问题
[comm]

# 解决:
# - 确保所有 rank 执行相同的集合通信
# - 避免条件分支中的通信操作

问题 3: 内存碎片

12. 高级优化技巧

12.1 动态 Batch Size 调整

自适应 Batch Size 策略:

class AdaptiveBatchSizeTrainer:
    def __init__(self, initial_batch_size=4, target_memory_util=0.90):
        self.batch_size = initial_batch_size
        self.target_memory_util = target_memory_util
        self.adjustment_interval = 100  # 步数
    
    def adjust_batch_size(self, step):
        if step % self.adjustment_interval != 0:
            return
        
        # 获取当前内存使用
        memory_used = torch.cuda.memory_allocated()
        memory_total = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory
        memory_util = memory_used / memory_total
        
        if step < 1000:  # 搜索阶段
            if memory_util < 0.85:
                # 内存充足, 尝试增大
                self.batch_size += 1
                logger.info(f"Increasing batch size to {self.batch_size}")
            elif memory_util > 0.95:
                # 接近 OOM, 减小
                self.batch_size = max(1, self.batch_size - 1)
                logger.info(f"Decreasing batch size to {self.batch_size}")
        
        return self.batch_size

# 使用
trainer = AdaptiveBatchSizeTrainer(initial_batch_size=4)
for step in range(max_steps):
    batch_size = trainer.adjust_batch_size(step)
    # ... 训练逻辑

12.2 混合精度训练高级配置

分层精度策略:

# 不同层使用不同精度
class MixedPrecisionStrategy:
    def __init__(self, model):
        self.model = model
    
    def apply_layerwise_precision(self):
        for name, module in self.model.named_modules():
            if 'attention' in name:
                # 注意力层使用 BF16
                module.to(dtype=torch.bfloat16)
            elif 'output' in name:
                # 输出层保持 FP32 提高精度
                module.to(dtype=torch.float32)
            elif 'norm' in name:
                # Norm 层使用 FP32
                module.to(dtype=torch.float32)
            else:
                # FFN 层可以使用 FP8 (如果支持)
                if hasattr(module, 'to_float8'):
                    module.to_float8()

# 动态精度调整
class DynamicPrecisionScaling:
    def __init__(self, init_scale=65536.0):
        self.scale = init_scale
        self.growth_factor = 2.0
        self.backoff_factor = 0.5
        self.growth_interval = 2000
    
    def update(self, overflow):
        if overflow:
            self.scale *= self.backoff_factor
        else:
            self.scale *= self.growth_factor
        
        self.scale = max(1.0, min(self.scale, 65536.0))

12.3 通信优化高级技巧

重叠通信和计算:

import torch.distributed as dist

class OverlappedAllReduce:
    def __init__(self, model, bucket_size_mb=25):
        self.model = model
        self.bucket_size = bucket_size_mb * 1024 * 1024
        self.handles = []
    
    def backward_with_overlap(self, loss):
        # 注册 hook 在每个参数梯度就绪后立即启动 AllReduce
        for param in self.model.parameters():
            if param.requires_grad:
                param.register_post_accumulate_grad_hook(
                    self._allreduce_hook
                )
        
        # 执行反向传播
        loss.backward()
        
        # 等待所有通信完成
        for handle in self.handles:
            handle.wait()
        self.handles.clear()
    
    def _allreduce_hook(self, param):
        # 异步 AllReduce
        handle = dist.all_reduce(
            param.grad.data,
            async_op=True
        )
        self.handles.append(handle)

# 使用
overlap_comm = OverlappedAllReduce(model)
loss = model(batch)
overlap_comm.backward_with_overlap(loss)

分层通信策略:

# 按层大小分组通信
class HierarchicalCommunication:
    def __init__(self, model):
        self.small_params = []  # < 1MB
        self.medium_params = []  # 1-10MB
        self.large_params = []  # > 10MB
        
        for param in model.parameters():
            size_mb = param.numel() * param.element_size() / 1e6
            if size_mb < 1:
                self.small_params.append(param)
            elif size_mb < 10:
                self.medium_params.append(param)
            else:
                self.large_params.append(param)
    
    def allreduce_hierarchical(self):
        # 小参数: 合并后通信
        if self.small_params:
            flat_tensor = torch.cat([p.grad.flatten() for p in self.small_params])
            dist.all_reduce(flat_tensor)
            # 拆分回原始形状
        
        # 中等参数: 分批通信
        for param in self.medium_params:
            dist.all_reduce(param.grad)
        
        # 大参数: 分块通信
        for param in self.large_params:
            chunk_size = 10 * 1024 * 1024  # 10MB chunks
            for i in range(0, param.grad.numel(), chunk_size):
                chunk = param.grad.flatten()[i:i+chunk_size]
                dist.all_reduce(chunk)

12.4 自动调优系统

基于强化学习的超参数搜索:

class AutoTuner:
    def __init__(self, config_space):
        self.config_space = config_space
        self.history = []
        self.best_config = None
        self.best_throughput = 0
    
    def suggest_config(self):
        """ 使用贝叶斯优化推荐下一个配置 """
        if len(self.history) < 10:
            # 随机探索
            return self._random_config()
        else:
            # 基于历史的智能搜索
            return self._bayesian_optimize()
    
    def _random_config(self):
        return {
            'tp': random.choice([1, 2, 4, 8]),
            'pp': random.choice([1, 2, 4, 8]),
            'batch_size': random.choice([2, 4, 8, 16]),
            'ac_option': random.choice(["1", "2", "none"]),
        }
    
    def record_result(self, config, throughput):
        self.history.append((config, throughput))
        if throughput > self.best_throughput:
            self.best_config = config
            self.best_throughput = throughput
    
    def get_best_config(self):
        return self.best_config

# 使用示例
auto_tuner = AutoTuner(config_space={})
for trial in range(20):
    config = auto_tuner.suggest_config()
    throughput = run_training_trial(config)
    auto_tuner.record_result(config, throughput)

print(f"最佳配置: {auto_tuner.get_best_config()}")

12.5 定制 CUDA Kernel

融合操作减少内存访问:

import triton
import triton.language as tl

@triton.jit
def fused_layernorm_residual_kernel(
    x_ptr, residual_ptr, weight_ptr, bias_ptr, output_ptr,
    stride, N, eps: tl.constexpr, BLOCK_SIZE: tl.constexpr,
):
    """ 融合 LayerNorm + Residual 连接 """
    row = tl.program_id(0)
    cols = tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE)
    mask = cols < N
    
    # 加载数据
    x = tl.load(x_ptr + row * stride + cols, mask=mask, other=0.0)
    residual = tl.load(residual_ptr + row * stride + cols, mask=mask, other=0.0)
    
    # Residual 连接
    x = x + residual
    
    # LayerNorm
    mean = tl.sum(x, axis=0) / N
    var = tl.sum((x - mean) ** 2, axis=0) / N
    x_norm = (x - mean) / tl.sqrt(var + eps)
    
    # Scale and shift
    weight = tl.load(weight_ptr + cols, mask=mask)
    bias = tl.load(bias_ptr + cols, mask=mask)
    output = x_norm * weight + bias
    
    # 存储结果
    tl.store(output_ptr + row * stride + cols, output, mask=mask)

class FusedLayerNormResidual(torch.nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, normalized_shape, eps=1e-5):
        super().__init__()
        self.weight = torch.nn.Parameter(torch.ones(normalized_shape))
        self.bias = torch.nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(normalized_shape))
        self.eps = eps
    
    def forward(self, x, residual):
        # 调用定制 kernel
        output = torch.empty_like(x)
        fused_layernorm_residual_kernel[(x.shape[0],)](
            x, residual, self.weight, self.bias, output,
            x.stride(0), x.shape[1], self.eps, BLOCK_SIZE=1024,
        )
        return output

12.6 多阶段训练策略

渐进式训练方法:

class ProgressiveTrainingStrategy:
    """
    阶段 1: 小模型、短序列快速迭代
    阶段 2: 中等大小、中等序列
    阶段 3: 完整模型、完整序列
    """
    
    stages = [
        {
            "name": "Stage 1: Warmup",
            "steps": 5000,
            "config": {
                "seq_len": 1024,
                "batch_size": 16,
                "lr": 3e-4,
                "activation_checkpoint": "none",
            },
            "goal": "快速验证模型收敛性",
        },
        {
            "name": "Stage 2: Ramp-up",
            "steps": 20000,
            "config": {
                "seq_len": 2048,
                "batch_size": 8,
                "lr": 3e-4,
                "activation_checkpoint": "selective",
            },
            "goal": "逐步增加难度",
        },
        {
            "name": "Stage 3: Full Training",
            "steps": 75000,
            "config": {
                "seq_len": 4096,
                "batch_size": 4,
                "lr": 1.5e-4,  # 降低 LR
                "activation_checkpoint": "selective",
            },
            "goal": "完整训练",
        },
    ]
    
    def get_stage_config(self, step):
        cumulative_steps = 0
        for stage in self.stages:
            cumulative_steps += stage["steps"]
            if step < cumulative_steps:
                return stage["config"]
        return self.stages[-1]["config"]

12.7 智能检查点策略

基于损失曲线的检查点:

class SmartCheckpointing:
    def __init__(self, base_interval=500):
        self.base_interval = base_interval
        self.loss_history = []
        self.checkpoint_history = []
    
    def should_save_checkpoint(self, step, loss):
        self.loss_history.append((step, loss))
        
        # 规则 1: 基本间隔
        if step % self.base_interval == 0:
            return True, "regular"
        
        # 规则 2: 损失显著下降
        if len(self.loss_history) > 100:
            recent_improvement = self._calculate_improvement()
            if recent_improvement > 0.05:  # 5% improvement
                return True, "significant_improvement"
        
        # 规则 3: 损失波动 (可能过拟合)
        if self._detect_instability():
            return True, "instability_detected"
        
        return False, None
    
    def _calculate_improvement(self, window=100):
        recent_losses = [l for _, l in self.loss_history[-window:]]
        if len(recent_losses) < window:
            return 0
        
        avg_old = sum(recent_losses[:window//2]) / (window//2)
        avg_new = sum(recent_losses[window//2:]) / (window//2)
        return (avg_old - avg_new) / avg_old
    
    def _detect_instability(self, window=50, threshold=0.2):
        if len(self.loss_history) < window:
            return False
        
        recent = [l for _, l in self.loss_history[-window:]]
        std = torch.tensor(recent).std().item()
        mean = torch.tensor(recent).mean().item()
        cv = std / mean  # 变异系数
        
        return cv > threshold

12.8 实验管理系统

自动记录和对比:

import wandb
import hashlib
import json

class ExperimentTracker:
    def __init__(self, project_name="torchtitan-optimization"):
        self.project_name = project_name
        self.experiments = {}
    
    def start_experiment(self, config):
        # 生成配置 hash 作为实验 ID
        config_str = json.dumps(config, sort_keys=True)
        exp_id = hashlib.md5(config_str.encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
        
        # 初始化 WandB
        wandb.init(
            project=self.project_name,
            name=f"exp_{exp_id}",
            config=config,
            tags=self._generate_tags(config),
        )
        
        self.experiments[exp_id] = {
            "config": config,
            "start_time": time.time(),
            "metrics": [],
        }
        
        return exp_id
    
    def _generate_tags(self, config):
        tags = []
        if config.get('parallelism', {}).get('tensor_parallel_degree', 1) > 1:
            tags.append('tp_enabled')
        if config.get('compile', {}).get('enable', False):
            tags.append('compiled')
        if config.get('quantize', {}).get('linear', {}).get('float8', {}).get('recipe_name'):
            tags.append('fp8')
        return tags
    
    def log_metrics(self, exp_id, step, metrics):
        wandb.log(metrics, step=step)
        self.experiments[exp_id]["metrics"].append((step, metrics))
    
    def compare_experiments(self, exp_ids):
        """ 生成实验对比报告 """
        comparison = []
        for exp_id in exp_ids:
            exp = self.experiments[exp_id]
            final_metrics = exp["metrics"][-1][1] if exp["metrics"] else {}
            comparison.append({
                "exp_id": exp_id,
                "config": exp["config"],
                "throughput": final_metrics.get("throughput", 0),
                "mfu": final_metrics.get("mfu", 0),
                "loss": final_metrics.get("loss", float('inf')),
            })
        
        # 按吞吐量排序
        comparison.sort(key=lambda x: x["throughput"], reverse=True)
        return comparison

# 使用示例
tracker = ExperimentTracker()

config_a = {"tp": 4, "pp": 8, "batch_size": 4}
exp_a = tracker.start_experiment(config_a)
# ... 训练 ...
tracker.log_metrics(exp_a, step=1000, {"throughput": 520000, "mfu": 0.45})

config_b = {"tp": 8, "pp": 4, "batch_size": 4}
exp_b = tracker.start_experiment(config_b)
# ... 训练 ...
tracker.log_metrics(exp_b, step=1000, {"throughput": 480000, "mfu": 0.42})

# 对比结果
results = tracker.compare_experiments([exp_a, exp_b])
print("实验对比:")
for r in results:
    print(f"  {r['exp_id']}: {r['throughput']/1000:.0f}K tok/s, MFU {r['mfu']:.1%}")
